postReview.title: Portugal 2-2 Spain (aet, 5-3 pens): Costa's shootout heroics seals Nations League glory
postReview.description: Portugal were crowned Nations League champions for the second time following a penalty shootout victory over Spain on Sunday.

QAData.question: Who won between Portugal and Spain on Sun, 08 Jun 2025 19:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Portugal won 2–2 (5–3) over Spain after penalties on Sun, 08 Jun 2025 19:00:00 GMT.
